title: Claude Custom Connector Explained  | Connect Your Own APIs & Apps
summary: Claude's Custom Connector feature enables direct integration of Claude with user-owned APIs, databases, and applications, extending beyond pre-built connectors. Users can connect private APIs, company databases, and internal tools to leverage Claude's AI capabilities with proprietary data. Setup involves API configuration and authentication.
